category_sources: source_facts.description says chaoskube periodically kills random Kubernetes pods; official GitHub README says it tests systems under arbitrary pod failures and documents Kubernetes/Helm deployment.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chaoskube; official GitHub README heading and repository name use chaoskube.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface, covering why, examples, Helm install, raw manifests, configuration, filtering, limits, and flags.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/linki/chaoskube; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify Kubernetes pod termination, chaos testing, Helm installation, pod filters, and Go implementation.
